description: Evaluator-facing neutral-slot Oracle KO inventory derived from the canonical fixture manifest.
scope: Supports the existing Relation checker and evaluator for the matched primary pair subset.
notes: This artifact contains only slots referenced by recoverable primary pairs.
It is evaluator-facing and does not repair B-prime model input.

objects.name: Gradient
source_spans: The gradient collects the partial derivatives of a scalar function.

objects.name: Gradient Descent
source_spans: Gradient descent uses the gradient to update parameters.

objects.name: Taylor Remainder
source_spans: A Taylor remainder describes the error left after truncating a Taylor expansion.

objects.name: Optimisation Problem
source_spans: An optimisation problem asks for an input that minimizes an objective.
